evals.name: linkedin-post-routes-to-linkedin-specialist
evals.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post about our new Profiles feature — builders can now have public profiles at base44.com/@username with an app showcase and reputation system
evals.expected_output: LinkedIn post in brand voice, 80-120 words, with 2-3 variations

assertions.text: Routes to linkedin-specialist agent (not copywriter or seo-specialist)
Loads linkedin-viral skill
Loads shared-instructions skill (injected via frontmatter)
Output contains 2-3 variations with different angles

evals.name: x-thread-routes-to-x-specialist
evals.prompt: Create a thread for X about hitting $100M ARR — we want to celebrate the milestone with our community
evals.expected_output: X thread with 5-12 tweets, each under 280 chars

assertions.text: Routes to x-specialist agent (not linkedin-specialist)
Loads x-viral skill
Each tweet is under 280 characters
Thread uses 🧵 or 👇 signal

evals.name: strategy-routes-to-gtm-not-content
evals.prompt: Help me think through our go-to-market for the new Agents feature — I want a holistic plan, not just content
evals.expected_output: Discovery questions first, then strategic plan. No content generation.

assertions.text: Routes to gtm-strategist agent (not planner or copywriter)
Starts with discovery questions, not content
Does NOT produce LinkedIn posts, tweets, or email copy
Asks at least 3 discovery questions before planning

evals.name: paid-ad-routes-to-ad-specialist
evals.prompt: Create a Meta feed ad for our gift cards feature — $10 to $500, send someone the ability to build their first app
evals.expected_output: Ad package with headline (<40 chars), primary text (<130 chars), visual prompt

assertions.text: Routes to ad-specialist agent
Headline is under 40 characters
Primary text is under 130 characters
Uses one of the 5 approved ad styles (sunrise, ocean, sky-mist, warm-sand, gift-card)
Runs visual quality gate (10-item checklist)

evals.name: no-banned-words-in-linkedin-post
evals.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post announcing that Base44 now supports custom AI agents that builders can configure per workspace
evals.expected_output: LinkedIn post free of all 130+ banned words

assertions.text: Does NOT contain 'leverage', 'utilize', 'delve', 'craft', 'streamline', 'harness', 'empower'
Does NOT contain 'groundbreaking', 'robust', 'seamless', 'transformative', 'unprecedented'
Does NOT contain 'However,', 'Moreover,', 'Furthermore,', 'Additionally,', 'Nevertheless,'
Uses 'builders' not 'users' or 'customers'
Uses 'ship' or 'go live' not 'deploy' or 'launch'

evals.name: no-em-dashes-no-rule-of-three
evals.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post about Base44 reaching 50,000 active builders this month
evals.expected_output: Post with zero em dashes, no rule-of-three patterns, no stacked fragments

assertions.text: Contains zero em dashes (— or --)
No rule-of-three: no groups of exactly 3 parallel adjectives, bullets, or phrases
No stacked declarative fragments (e.g., 'One platform. Unlimited builders. No friction.')
No contrast framing (e.g., 'It's not X, it's Y')
No stacked short sentences (3+ short sentences in a row for dramatic effect)
No 'Let's dive in' or 'Let's break this down' openers

evals.name: maor-test-natural-voice
evals.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post from Maor's personal account about shipping app migration — builders can now move entire workspaces between accounts
evals.expected_output: Post in Maor's voice: casual, specific, story-driven. Uses 'I' not 'we'.

assertions.text: Uses 'I' pronouns (Maor personal account), not 'we'
Reads like a real person talking, not copywriting
Leads with user value, not feature name
No self-narration ('Here's why this matters', 'The key takeaway is')
No fake vulnerability ('Honestly wasn't sure', 'Not gonna lie')

evals.name: positive-framing-no-competitors
evals.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post about Base44's new public profiles — we're the first app builder to offer this
evals.expected_output: Post that leads with builder benefit, never mentions competitors by name

assertions.text: Does NOT name any competitors (Lovable, Bolt, Bubble, FlutterFlow, Glide, Monday, Adalo)
Leads with what the builder gets, not what others lack
No 'Unlike other platforms' or 'No other tool' framing
Feature name is NOT the hook — builder outcome is

evals.name: push-to-activity-correct-enums
evals.prompt: Push the Profiles launch content to the marketing activity
evals.expected_output: MarketingActivity payload with correct enum values

assertions.text: status field is 'new' (not 'draft', not 'pending')
approval_status field is 'draft' (not 'pending', not 'submitted')
activity_type is one of: social_media, email, event, content, pr, other
content_maturity is 'raw_draft'
generation_method is 'ai_generated'

evals.name: push-includes-all-provenance-fields
evals.prompt: Push the current LinkedIn and X content to the marketing activity for Profiles launch

assertions.text: Payload contains 'created_by_user' field (non-empty)
Payload contains 'created_by_tool' field matching 'Marketing Plugin v1.18'
Payload contains 'generation_method' field
Payload contains 'pushed_at' field with ISO timestamp
Payload contains 'content_maturity' field
Payload contains 'last_edited_by' field
Payload contains 'last_edited_at' field
Payload contains 'edit_history' array with at least 1 entry
edit_history[0] has: timestamp, user, action, tool, channels_affected, note

evals.name: activity-number-auto-assigned
evals.prompt: Create a new marketing activity for the Debug Mode feature and push the content

assertions.text: Payload contains 'activity_number' field
activity_number is a positive integer (not 0, not null)
Activity number is reported as MA-{number} in the success output

evals.name: collision-detected-on-existing-content
evals.prompt: Push new LinkedIn content to the Profiles launch marketing activity (which already has LinkedIn content from a previous push)
evals.expected_output: Collision detected, user prompted with Replace/Create v2/Cancel options

assertions.text: Detects that linkedin_base44_content is non-empty on existing record
Shows collision warning with channel name and existing author
Presents AskUserQuestion with 3 options: Replace, Create v2, Cancel
Does NOT silently overwrite existing content

evals.name: no-collision-on-empty-slots
evals.prompt: Push community Discord content to the Profiles launch marketing activity (which has LinkedIn and X but no community content yet)
evals.expected_output: No collision, content pushed to empty slot without prompting

assertions.text: Detects that community_content is empty on existing record
Does NOT show collision warning
Fills community_content via PUT without user prompt
Preserves existing linkedin and x content untouched

evals.name: brand-guardian-catches-violations
evals.prompt: Review this LinkedIn post for brand compliance: 'We're excited to announce our groundbreaking new feature — a seamless, robust platform that leverages AI to transform how users deploy applications. Here's why this matters:'
evals.expected_output: Brand guardian scores this low and identifies all violations

assertions.text: Flags 'We're excited to announce' as banned opener
Flags 'groundbreaking', 'seamless', 'robust' as banned AI adjectives
Flags 'leverages' as banned AI verb
Flags 'users' (should be 'builders')
Flags 'deploy' (should be 'ship' or 'go live')
Flags em dash (—)
Flags 'Here's why this matters' as self-narration
Score is below 7/10
Provides rewritten version fixing all issues

evals.name: launch-waterfall-triggers-on-feature-launch
evals.prompt: We're shipping Profiles next week — I need a full launch plan with content for all channels
evals.expected_output: Launch waterfall Phase 0-1 kicks off, not just a single post

assertions.text: Triggers launch-waterfall skill (not just linkedin-specialist or planner)
Starts with Phase 1: Product Understanding (not jumping to content)
Does NOT immediately produce LinkedIn/X posts
Asks discovery questions about the feature before planning

evals.name: repurpose-routes-correctly
evals.prompt: Take this LinkedIn post and turn it into an X thread and a Discord announcement
evals.expected_output: Content adapted for each platform with correct formatting

assertions.text: Triggers cross-platform-repurpose skill
X thread: each tweet under 280 chars
Discord: casual tone, no external links in main post
Adapts voice and structure per platform (not just copy-paste)

evals.name: user-value-first-not-feature-name
evals.prompt: Write a LinkedIn post about our new Builder Skills feature
evals.expected_output: Post leads with what builder can do, not the feature name

assertions.text: Hook/first line is about builder outcome, NOT 'Introducing Builder Skills'
Feature name appears buried in body, not as the hook
No 'We just shipped Builder Skills' as the opening

evals.name: feature-brief-correct-enums
evals.prompt: Pull a feature brief for the Agents feature from the #feat-agents Slack channel
evals.expected_output: Feature brief with correct MarketingActivity enum values

assertions.text: MarketingActivity status is 'new' (not 'draft' or 'pending')
approval_status is 'draft' (not 'pending')
activity_type is 'content' (not 'feature_launch')
Includes provenance fields (created_by_user, created_by_tool, etc.)
